# PlayToneAction.Tone.hardPause

**Case**

A person entered a hard pause.

## Declaration

```swift
case hardPause
```

## Discussion

A semicolon (;) indicates a hard pause. When a person enters a hard pause, the system waits for further user interaction before it dials additional digits.

## Keypad tones

- **PlayToneAction.Tone.single**: A person entered a digit.
- **PlayToneAction.Tone.softPause**: A person entered a soft pause.

items.description: A person entered a soft pause.
